name: Active Directory Group/Computer Enumeration
notes:
This rule triggers when group or computer is enumerated within Active Directory.

Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Active Directory Group Enumeration With Get-AdGroup
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of the "Get-AdGroup" cmdlet to enumerate Groups within Active Directory

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Active Directory Computers Enumeration with Get-AdComputer
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of the "Get-AdComputer" to enumerate Computers within Active Directory.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches (("Command" LIKE '%Get-AdGroup %' OR "Command" LIKE '%Get-AdComputer %') AND "Command" LIKE '%-Filter%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Active Directory Group/Computer Enumeration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches (("Command" LIKE '%Get-AdGroup %' OR "Command" LIKE '%Get-AdComputer %') AND "Command" LIKE '%-Filter%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Active Directory Group/Computer Enumeration
Event description: This rule triggers when group or computer is enumerated within Active Directory.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
